message:
test(mcp): add unit tests for McpClientError, ExternalServerConfig, tool definitions, and content items

Cover serde roundtrips, Display formatting, hint builder, destructiveness
detection, and content-item text extraction for MCP client types that
previously had no dedicated test coverage. Import reorder only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
